summary: Compress and hash legacy artifacts into cold storage snapshots with receipts.

steps.title: Capture cold storage requirements
steps.notes: Summarised backlog intent, CLI sketch, receipts, and risks.

steps.title: Design snapshot format + workflow
steps.notes: Define tarball format, manifest schema, verification strategy, and CI hooks.

steps.title: Implement tooling + guard
steps.notes: Build snapshot CLI, add tests/docs, and enforce guard to prevent raw artifacts from landing.

checkpoint.description: Legacy artifacts stored as hashed snapshots with CI enforcement.
